ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the region's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "virus_type" TEXT /* Type of virus */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Primary mode of transmission */,
  "incubation_period" INTEGER /* Typical incubation period in days */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* List of common symptoms */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the disease's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease being tracked */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Provenance information for the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission rate */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the rate belongs to */,
  "rt_2_5" REAL /* Transmission rate for 2.5% of the population */,
  "rt_10" REAL /* Transmission rate for 10% of the population */,
  "rt_20" REAL /* Transmission rate for 20% of the population */,
  "rt_25" REAL /* Transmission rate for 25% of the population */,
  "rt_30" REAL /* Transmission rate for 30% of the population */,
  "rt_40" REAL /* Transmission rate for 40% of the population */,
  "rt_50" REAL /* Transmission rate for 50% of the population */,
  "rt_60" REAL /* Transmission rate for 60% of the population */,
  "rt_70" REAL /* Transmission rate for 70% of the population */,
  "rt_75" REAL /* Transmission rate for 75% of the population */,
  "rt_80" REAL /* Transmission rate for 80% of the population */,
  "rt_90" REAL /* Transmission rate for 90% of the population */,
  "rt_97_5" REAL /* Transmission rate for 97.5% of the population */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate transmission rates */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the transmission rates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the transmission rates were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_rates_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, epidemiologist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the changes made in this version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the version was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease causing the outbreak */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the outbreak occurred */,
  "outbreak_date" TEXT /* Date the outbreak started */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outbreak */,
  "cases_count" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases in the outbreak */,
  "deaths_count" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the outbreak */,
  "recovered_count" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases in the outbreak */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the outbreak data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_outbreaks_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_outbreaks_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outbreak the study was conducted on */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date the study was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., observational, experimental) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the study */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion of the study */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the study data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_studies_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES disease_outbreaks ("outbreak_id")
)
